author: Simon G.
pros: It is a Simple and efficient solution that offers us a lot of security
cons: The costs associated with the backup solution

author: Luca J.
pros: Die Simple Methode Datein wiederherzustellen, es ist leicht einbindbar in Teams, wodurch durch einen simplen Teams Chat deine Daten wiederhergestellt werden kann
cons: Es ist bei der Beschreibung der Daten der ungenau, beispielsweise zeigt es an das Microsoft O365 Gruppen wiederhergestellt werden können, als End User würde ich mich erstmal fragen was dies für eine Datei ist.

review_title: I recommend Exclaimer to all of my customers
author: GianPaolo P.
pros: The ability to backup all data from our Office365 tenancy is a key part of our Disaster Recovery Plan. AvePoint makes it super simple to restore emails/files/folders whenever a request is raised.
cons: One thing that is missing is the ability to do on Demand Backup's(incase we need to push a change), we can change the schedule as needed, but it'd be easier to be able to do a one touch On Demand backup.

author: Marion F.
pros: Wir nutzen Avepoint um tägliche Backups jeglicher Services zu erstellen und um Daten wiederherstellen zu können. Es ist übersichtlich und leicht zu nutzen.
cons: Viele Features muss man noch dazu buchen, es ist nicht direkt alles dabei.

author: David A.
pros: It is a perfect solution for backup and recovery.We use it to back up the sharepoint with usRestoring works without problems and the exact file search is also wonderful.
cons: The costs are not exactly low, but the range of functions is huge.

description: i have realzded that im only going to be using this application in the future and that if i ever need help i will be using this
author: devran R.
pros: the backup funktion or the part where it shows you how to use the software
cons: nothing really maybe i would wish for more features for customeers
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Maren C.
pros: I really like the fact that it is so easy, I just call an Admin if I am missing files and they get recovered in not even a day.
cons: I dont really understand the tool in the background. For me everything is amazing!
